title: Bass with Sea Salt Gratin
description: A flavorful and rich dish featuring bass fillets topped with a sea salt and gooey cheese gratin.

ingredients.name: Gooey cheese
ingredients.notes: A blend of cheddar and parmesan

instructions: Season the bass fillets with Canadian sea salt.
In a baking dish, arrange the bass fillets in a single layer.
Dot the top of each fillet with butter.
Sprinkle the gooey cheese evenly over the fish.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the cheese is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
